description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a matte black finish and a streamlined profile. The body is constructed primarily from metal, with polymer components visible on the grip and stock for ergonomic handling. It has a detachable box magazine located just in front of the trigger guard, and a prominent Picatinny rail system along the top for mounting optics or accessories. The stock is fixed and robust, providing stability for accurate shooting, while the barrel is of standard length and appears to be free of any additional muzzle devices. Iron sights are integrated into the top rail, and the overall build suggests durability and functionality for urban environments.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a fixed stock, detachable box magazine, and integrated iron sights, featuring a robust metal and polymer construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, fixed stock, detachable magazine, and top rail system.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock and the back of the receiver, with the grip and magazine visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rifle's profile, magazine, and ergonomic grip.
